# Beaver Study Orchestrator

Purpose: study orchestration board with planning, outcomes, history, and adaptive next steps
Free entry point: free local study planner and public demo
Paid boundary: premium study history, cohort dashboard, and exportable progress report
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/beaver-study-orchestrator/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/beaver-study-orchestrator
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/beaver-study-orchestrator/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/beaver-study-orchestrator/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: https://github.com/KIM3310/beaver-study-orchestrator/issues/new?template=service-inquiry.yml&title=Private+workspace+inquiry%3A+Beaver+Study+Orchestrator

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for Beaver Study Orchestrator demo, Beaver Study Orchestrator system architecture, Beaver Study Orchestrator educational tool, study orchestration board with planning, outcomes, history, and adaptive next steps service.
